programs.title: Proof of Concept S1 - "The Infinite"
programs.desc: Kyle Hill & Eugenia Cheng join the show to prove there is more than one infinity, that infinity is hidden all around us, & that we might actually be infinite ourselves.

programs.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S6 - "The Ocean’s Apex"
programs.desc: In this episode, we observe two of the ocean’s apex predators in the wild.

programs.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S6 - "Wind"
programs.desc: In this episode, Philippe takes us inside one of the most powerful forces on Earth - wind.

programs.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S6 - "Student Explorer"
programs.desc: In this episode, we reveal the winner of our third ever #StudentExplorer Contest.

programs.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S6 - "Sustainable Leaders"
programs.desc: In this episode, we’ll visit a facility in Reno that makes biofuel for United Airlines aircraft.

programs.title: Angry Planet S2 - "Hot and Cold Crystals"
programs.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews – “Angry Planet” plans to be one of the first in!
